name: Peanut Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter or vegan margarine in a large saucepan and sauté the onion and celery for 10 minutes.
2. Stir in the herbs and flour, cooking for an additional 1-2 minutes.
3. Add the stock and stir until thickened. Then add the soy sauce, yeast extract, nuts, breadcrumbs, salt, and pepper.
4. Allow the mixture to cool, then form into 6 flat burgers about ½-inch thick.
5. Coat each burger with dried breadcrumbs.
6. Sauté the burgers in a very little oil (the frying pan should be greased rather than oily) for about 3 minutes on each side until browned and crisp. Drain on paper towels.
7. Garnish with lettuce leaves, tomato slices, and cucumber slices and serve.
Variation: Macadamia Nut Burgers
Using macadamia nuts instead of peanuts makes these burgers special. Serve with Béarnaise Sauce.
